---
title: "Langley School"
sort_title: "Langley School"
slug: "langley_school"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
---




A Google scan of an 1850 edition at Bodley is currently (March 2008) available on Google. A PDF version is also available for download from the Google webpage.

[Click here to see the text](http://books.google.co.uk/books?id=0a8NAAAAQAAJ&printsec=frontcover&dq=charlotte%2Bmary%2Byonge&lr=&as_brr=1#PPP7,M1)
